1.gl: an edge or extremity; specifically (of a bird or army) a wing, (of a garment or bedclothing) a flap, (of the earth) a quarter, (of a building) a pinnacle
1.kj: [phrase] bird, border, corner, end, feather(-ed), [idiom] flying, [phrase] (one an-) other, overspreading, [idiom] quarters, skirt, [idiom] sort, uttermost part, wing(-ed).

1.gl: properly, a region across; but used only adverbially (with or without a preposition) on the opposite side (especially of the Jordan; ususally meaning the east)
1.kj: [idiom] against, beyond, by, [idiom] from, over, passage, quarter, (other, this) side, straight.

1.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
1.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
1.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

1.gl: a clatter, i.e. (abstractly) whirring (of wings); (concretely) a cricket; also a harpoon (as rattling), a cymbal (as clanging)
Cush (or Ethiopia), the name of a son of Ham, and of his territory; also of an Israelite
a stream (including the sea; expectation the Nile, Euphrates, etc.); figuratively, prosperity

2.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
2.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
2.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

2.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
2.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

2.gl: to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications)
2.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, [idiom] earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put

2.gl: something prepared, i.e. any apparatus (as an implement, utensil, dress, vessel or weapon)
2.kj: armour(-bearer), artillery, bag, carriage, [phrase] furnish, furniture, instrument, jewel, that is made of, [idiom] one from another, that which pertaineth, pot, [phrase] psaltery,

2.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
2.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

2.gl: to draw, used in a great variety of applications (including to sow, to sound, to prolong, to develop, to march, to remove, to delay, to be tall, etc.)
2.kj: draw (along, out), continue, defer, extend, forbear, [idiom] give, handle, make (pro-, sound) long, [idiom] sow, scatter, stretch out.

3.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
3.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

3.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
3.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

3.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
3.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

3.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
3.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

3.gl: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
3.kj: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up).
3.dv: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם));

3.gl: to clatter, i.e. slap (the hands together), clang (an instrument); by analogy, to drive (a nail or tent-pin, a dart, etc.); by implication, to become bondsman by handclasping)
3.kj: blow (a trumpet), cast, clap, fasten, pitch (tent), smite, sound, strike, [idiom] suretiship, thrust.

4.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

4.gl: properly, like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so); also (of place) here (or hither); or (of time) now
4.kj: also, here, + hitherto, like, on the other side, so (and much), such, on that manner, (on) this (manner, side, way, way and that way), + mean while, yonder.
4.dv: from the prefix k and H1931 (הוּא);

4.gl: properly, an envelope, i.e. darkness (or density, 2 Chronicles 4:17); specifically, a (scud) cloud; also a copse
4.kj: clay, (thick) cloud, [idiom] thick, thicket. Compare H5672 (עֲבִי).

4.gl: severed, i.e. harvest (as reaped), the crop, the time, the reaper, or figuratively; also a limb (of a tree, or simply foliage)
to scan, i.e. look intently at; by implication, to regard with pleasure, favor or care
4.kj: (cause to) behold, consider, look (down), regard, have respect, see.

4.gl: illumination or (concrete) luminary (in every sense, including lightning, happiness, etc.)
4.kj: bright, clear, [phrase] day, light (-ning), morning, sun.

5.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
5.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
5.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

5.gl: to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces)
5.kj: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wan
be(-head), bring, call back, decline, depart, eschew, get (you), go (aside), [idiom] grievous, lay away (by), leave undone, be past, pluck away, put (away, down), rebel, remove (to

5.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
5.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

5.gl: to complete, in a good or a bad sense, literal, or figurative, transitive or intransitive
5.kj: accomplish, cease, be clean (pass-) ed, consume, have done, (come to an, have an, make an) end, fail, come to the full, be all gone, [idiom] be all here, be (make) perfect, be spen

5.gl: to treat a person (well or ill), i.e. benefit or requite; by implication (of toil), to ripen, i.e. (specifically) to wean
5.kj: bestow on, deal bountifully, do (good), recompense, requite, reward, ripen, [phrase] serve, mean, yield.

6.gl: to pull off, i.e. (by implication) to expose (as by stripping); specifically, to betroth (as if a surrender); figuratively, to carp at, i.e. defame; to spend the winter
6.kj: betroth, blaspheme, defy, jeopard, rail, reproach, upbraid.
6.dv: a primitive root; also  denominative (from H2779 (חֹרֶף))

6.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
6.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
6.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

6.gl: to loosen, i.e. relinquish, permit, etc.
6.kj: commit self, fail, forsake, fortify, help, leave (destitute, off), refuse, [idiom] surely.

6.gl: properly, a dumb beast; especially any large quadruped or animal (often collective)
6.dv: from an unused root (probably meaning to be mute);

6.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)

6.kj: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

7.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
7.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

7.gl: to draw, used in a great variety of applications (including to sow, to sound, to prolong, to develop, to march, to remove, to delay, to be tall, etc.)
7.kj: draw (along, out), continue, defer, extend, forbear, [idiom] give, handle, make (pro-, sound) long, [idiom] sow, scatter, stretch out.

7.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
7.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
7.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

7.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
7.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

7.gl: time, especially (adverb with preposition) now, when, etc.
7.kj: [phrase] after, (al-) ways, [idiom] certain, [phrase] continually, [phrase] evening, long, (due) season, so (long) as, (even-, evening-, noon-) tide, (meal-), what) time, when.

7.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
7.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);
